text: あいつは……っ！

アークスどもの破損した船を
回収し、遊び場と変える、か……
相変わらず悪趣味だな、奴は。

余興程度にはなるかと思ったが……
やはり、この仕組みは
気に喰わん……滾るものがない。

義理は立てるが、義務はない。
もはや、これまでだな。

……む、貴様は。
このような場所で遭遇とは
くふふっ、随分と縁があるようだ。

貴方が……
ダークファルス【巨躯】。
ゲッテムハルト様を、奪ったもの……
……返せ。
何？

ゲッテムハルト様を……
返せぇッ！！
He's...! Ugh!

So he retook the damaged ARKS ship
and turned it into his playground?
Tasteless as always, I see.

I thought this would've at least been
entertaining. But I don't care for this
scheme. It lacks excitement.

I'll pull my weight, but I've no
obligation to be a party to this.
This is where I make my exit.

Ugh...it's you. I hadn't expected to run
into you here, though looks like our
destinies feel different.

You're...Dark Falz [Elder]. The one
who took Master Gettemhult...
Give him back.
What?
I said give him back, damn you...!
